hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]] && [[ "$FILE" =~ ^frontend/ ]]; then cd frontend && npx prettier --write "../$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "prisma migrate"; then echo "[Hook] Prisma migration detected — will run prisma generate after"; fi'
